div.div: A Neon Glow Lights the Way
I Really Want to Stay at Your House
I Got Smoke - Explicit Ver. (2024 Version)

div.b: Your fortune: Good news will come to you by mail

div.div: Kill 20 Jockeys with the shovel or pitchfork.
Kill a pouncing Hunter with a shotgun.
Kill a Tank only with damage from the original Survivors.
KILLING THEM SWIFTLY TO THIS SONG
Play the new Midnight Riders song on a jukebox.
Help porters through a MULE or terrorist area for the first time.
Complete at least 10 unique premium deliveries in each order category with an evaluation of "Legend," "Legend of Legends," or "Legend of Legends of Legends."
Find all the tarot graffiti for the job Fool on the Hill.
Obtained a new medal in campaign mode after having already obtained 9 or more medals.
Obtained a total of 100 aircraft, special weapons, and upgrade parts combined.
Destroyed a total of 3,000 enemies in campaign mode.
Kill 5 (or more) enemies with a single frag grenade.
You must really enjoy pain. Finish the game on 'Masochist' difficulty.
Action, Adventure, RPG, Simulation, Early Access
Hack a door or other security feature.
You created your very first item, all by yourself, probably.
One Down, One Million To Go
Kill a pest for the very first time.
Complete 8 different levels sequentially under par time without dying on Ultra-Violence or higher.
Immolate a total of 30 arachnoid enemies with the Incinerator.
Obliterate 50 enemies with a single shot of the Calamity Blade.
